name: Cast Iron Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 lb red bliss potatoes, cooked and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. On the grill, heat a large cast iron skillet until almost smoking.
2. Add olive oil and onions to the skillet. Stir onions until cooked.
3. Sear potatoes in the skillet with onions for 1 minute, cut side down, or until brown and crisp.
4. Remove from heat and transfer the potato mixture to a mixing bowl. Set the skillet aside.
5. In a blender, combine all vinaigrette ingredients except olive oil, and blend until smooth.
6. With the motor running, slowly add olive oil in a thin stream until the vinaigrette is emulsified.
7. Season the vinaigrette to taste with salt and freshly ground pepper.
8. In the mixing bowl, combine the potatoes and onions. Toss with Lime-Garlic Vinaigrette.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Serve in the cast iron skillet.
